title: See conversations in board item from all connected board conversations
excerpt: Create a conversation view that will allow the user to see all updates from all connected boards for an item. I don’t want to use a marketplace plug-in. I shouldn’t have to keep spending money to add features that should…

posts.author: arnoldprasad (Arnold P)
posts.cookedHtml: Create a conversation view that will allow the user to see all updates from all connected boards for an item. I don’t want to use a marketplace plug-in. I shouldn’t have to keep spending money to add features that should be inherent in Monday.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Arnold,

Thank you for your feature request - we hear where you’re coming from here and as always, will relay this to the dedicated team.

I wanted to check if you’d added your vote to the existing feature request here → Shared or mirrored updates for connected items?

Whilst this feature isn’t currently on our roadmap, each quarter we take the top-voted requests to our development team for an update. We encourage you to add your vote (if you haven’t already!) to put greater emphasis on this need.

You can learn more about the process here → All you need to know about our feature request process!

posts.author: hellotimi (David Kalu (Formula Pro - Use formula column results in automations!))
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi ,

We recently published a detailed guide showing how to resolve this issue. The guide shows how to sync updates between high level board items and several connected child board items, without the need to duplicate your items across multiple boards.

So when an update is posted on the high level board item, it is propagated down to all the connected child board items updates and when an update is posted on the child board, it is sent to the high level board connected items’ updates.

That way, the high level board item aggregates the updates from the child board items and the child board items can view updates from the high level board items.

Here’s the link to the guide: https://community.monday.com/t/seamlessly-sync-updates-conversations-across-connected-monday-com-boards/117493

And here’s a demo of the solution:

https://vimeo.com/1123552566?share=copy

posts.author: Fortimus_Team (Fortimus)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Folks,

I recommend you try our Mirror item Multiple Boards app.

It lets you -

  • Mirror the same item to multiple boards

  • Subitems, Updates(comments) + replies are live synced across boards as they happen

  • You get a complete sync overview of where the item lives

  • Setup automations like ‘When status changes/mirror item to Target Board’

How it works: You just select an item, choose which boards to mirror it to, and that’s it. Any updates sync automatically in real-time.

Happy to answer any questions or show a quick demo if helpful! Schedule a call here
